experiment: M3B leave-one-geometry-out capacity selection and abstention

design.evaluation_protocol: nested leave-one-geometry-out with ensemble members trained on proper subsets of training geometries

claims_boundary: Geometry families are synthetic angular layouts and one controlled calibration-offset signature, not OERF camera calibrations.
Leave-one-geometry-out tests transfer across declared synthetic layouts, not unseen hardware, optics, masks, or curved-ray physics.
Uncertainty scores use only model predictions and observable features, but percentile normalization assumes a batch from the current test geometry.
Full-rank fallback rejects additional temporal compression; it does not repair framewise forward-model bias.
Ground-truth field error is used only for retrospective regret, risk-coverage, and failure-cell auditing.
